overview: A 2D top-down browser-based battle royale game inspired by PUBG. Drop into an island map, loot weapons and armor, survive the shrinking safe zone, and outlast AI bots and other players to win.
features: 2D top-down gameplay with WASD movement and mouse aim
Shrinking safe zone with 3-4 phases and zone damage
Loot system: pistol, rifle, shotgun, sniper, armor tiers, health items
Mini-map, kill feed, HUD with health/armor/ammo
